description: Provides geospatial services including geocoding, reverse geocoding, place details, distance matrices, elevation data, and turn-by-turn directions.

tools.name: maps_geocode
tools.description: Convert a city name into geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) at city-level precision.

city.description: The city name to geocode (e.g., "New York", "Beijing", "Tokyo", "London"). Must be a valid city name only, no street addresses or detailed locations. Minimum 2 characters.

country.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., "US", "CN", "GB", "JP") to disambiguate cities with the same name. If provided, results will be prioritized for the specified country.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the city center.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the city center.

location.description: Geographic coordinates representing the center of the specified city.

formatted_address.description: Human-readable address string for the geocoded city.

place_id.description: The unique identifier of the geocoded place.

tools.name: maps_reverse_geocode
tools.description: Convert geographic coordinates into a human-readable address.

formatted_address.description: Human-readable address string for the provided coordinates.

place_id.description: The unique identifier of the reverse-geocoded place.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

coordinates.description: Geographic coordinates corresponding to the reverse-geocoded address.

tools.name: maps_place_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive information about a specific place including contact details, ratings, reviews, and business hours.

place_id.description: The unique identifier of the place.

formatted_address.description: Human-readable address string of the place.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the place.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the place.

place_id.description: The unique identifier of the place.

phone_number.description: Contact phone number of the place.

website.description: Official website URL of the place.

rating.description: Average rating score of the place.

tools.name: maps_distance_matrix
tools.description: Calculate distance and travel time between multiple origin and destination points, returning a matrix of distances and durations for all origin-destination pairs.

latitude.description: The latitude of the origin location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the origin location.

items.description: Origin location dictionary containing latitude and longitude. Maximum 25 origins.

latitude.description: The latitude of the destination location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the destination location.

items.description: Destination location dictionary containing latitude and longitude. Maximum 25 destinations.

value.description: Distance in meters between the origin and destination.

distance.description: Distance information for the origin-destination pair.

elements.description: List of distance elements for each origin-destination pair.

rows.description: List of rows representing origins, each containing distance elements to destinations.

tools.name: maps_elevation
tools.description: Retrieve elevation data above sea level for specific geographic locations.

items.description: Location dictionary containing latitude and longitude. Maximum 512 locations per request.

locations.description: List of location dictionaries for which to retrieve elevation data.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

elevation.description: Elevation above sea level in meters.

resolution.description: Accuracy of the elevation data in meters.

elevation_data.description: List of elevation results for each provided location.

tools.name: maps_directions
tools.description: Get detailed turn-by-turn directions between two locations with step-by-step navigation instructions, distance, and duration.

latitude.description: The latitude of the origin location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the origin location.

origin_location.description: Origin location dictionary containing latitude and longitude.

latitude.description: The latitude of the destination location.

longitude.description: The longitude of the destination location.

destination_location.description: Destination location dictionary containing latitude and longitude.

latitude.description: The latitude of the northeast bound.

longitude.description: The longitude of the northeast bound.

northeast.description: Northeast corner of the bounding box.

latitude.description: The latitude of the southwest bound.

longitude.description: The longitude of the southwest bound.

southwest.description: Southwest corner of the bounding box.

value.description: Distance of the leg in meters.
Duration of the leg in seconds.
Distance of the step in meters.
Duration of the step in seconds.

latitude.description: The latitude of the start location of the step.

longitude.description: The longitude of the start location of the step.

start_location.description: Starting geographic coordinates of the step.

latitude.description: The latitude of the end location of the step.

longitude.description: The longitude of the end location of the step.

end_location.description: Ending geographic coordinates of the step.

travel_mode.description: Mode of travel for the step (e.g., driving, bicycling, transit).

steps.description: List of turn-by-turn steps for the leg.

legs.description: List of route legs between waypoints.

routes.description: List of possible routes between origin and destination.
